- : app = { "type": symbol("normal"), "value": symbol("undefined"),
            "__completion__": true, "target": symbol("empty"),  }

> exec((("df -k "" + path) + """), function(err, stdout) {
  if (err) { return cb(err); }
  try { cb(null, parse(stdout)); } catch (e) { cb(e); }
});
